title: UnOrthodox
description: This is an addon for Palladium that is based on the UnOrdindary webtoon and MHA Universe, with over 50+ powers that are unique in their own way. With a ton of content to explore, delve into the superpowered high school universe..
body:
# **UnOrthodox is on an indefinite hiatus, there will be no more updates after V3.0.0**

Welcome to my addon for Palladium. My addon is based on the UnOrdindary webtoon (highly reccomend reading) Containing powers seen within the webtoon aswell as some new inventions of my own. Runs for Forge only, but requires Palladium

**EPILEPSY WARNING!!!!**

What content can I expect?

- 30+ obtainable powers , each with their own unique premise. Some are new, while others are classics
- Custom method to obtain the powers
- New items (Spectrum Potion, Auratic Orb)
- Custom achievements
- Unique power-per-power progression skill tree

**What powers are in my addon that are from UnOrdinary?**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Aura Manipulation
- Afterimage
- Particles
- Pulse (Ability Gauging but better)
- Energy Discharge
- Super Strength
- Time Manipulation
- Lightning
- Nightmare
- Explosion
- Hydro-freeze
- Shadow Flame
- Demon Claw
- Illumination
- Phase Shift
- Barrier
- Armour Suit
- Teleportation
- Healing

</details>



I have many more, the rest of them are custom powers that fit in the same universe. Images featured in the gallery are to showcase the iconic ones, that isnt how many are actually in my addon

**How are the powers unique?**

Aside from not being seen elsewhere, they each have their own mechanics and styles of gameplay. This allows them to contend with each other, and become stronger in their natural element. Every power is viable in some way, even if it isnt in the ways you normally expect. Furthermore, most are balanced to make sure there isnt any clear metas, but a personal preference. This only applies to any powers below God tier of course, since anything in that tier is objectively the best. 

**How do you obtain powers?**

Information can be found on the wiki, but they can be obtained through the Perfected Spectrum Potion, alongside a low chance with an Experimental Vial. There is a whole progression towards getting powers naturally in survival mode, so all revelants recipes can be found on the wiki

If you are looking for support, leave a comment on my curseforge page/modrinth or join my discord and ask me (which will be linked). If you are looking for info about the powers, it will be linked on my wiki below

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/zJSmMu8jsk

**Wiki:** https://gitlab.com/mewnot7/project-singular-wiki/-/wikis/home

Note: All content you see inside this addon is made personally by me, with the help from Goldfish (Echoes of Power) and Avi (Lab of Potentiality). Please do not steal, take or directly copy content. If you want help with code, just message me and ill provide help because I dont like to gatekeep. Most models are made by mostly Shadow, aka my modeller and a few are made by me

Thank you :)
